subcodes.first_line: Esteemed Nightingale! Since thou art privy to the mysteries of this servant, I shall therefore impart unto thee certain secrets, and these [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب عندلیب چون آنجناب اهل راز این عبد هستید لهذا از اسرار بیانی نمایم و آن
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
